title: Village Farms International Reports Strong Q3 2024 Results
text: Village Farms Q3 2024 consolidated total sales increased 20% to $83.4 million from $69.5 million. Net loss narrowed to $800,000 versus $1.3 million loss prior year. Adjusted EBITDA grew 63% to $5.3 million from $3.2 million. Operating cash flow was $4.3 million. Canadian Cannabis net sales grew 27% to $36.5 million with retail branded sales increased 22%. International medicinal sales surged 111%. Maintained number 2 market share position nationally and achieved number 1 position in Quebec market. Fresh Produce sales increased 20% to $42.8 million, returned to profitability with net income of $0.4 million versus $1.0 million loss. Adjusted EBITDA reached $2.3 million from $0.8 million. U.S. Cannabis sales declined to $3.9 million from $5.0 million with net loss of $0.2 million. Experienced $11.9 million goodwill impairment due to CBD market challenges. Commenced cultivation in Netherlands with sales to participating jurisdictions expected in first quarter of 2025.
